name: Brand

settings.label: Space
settings.description: Adjusts the spacing between logo and text.

settings.label: Text Color
settings.description: Overrides the default text color for the brand component.

settings.label: Font Size Multiplier
settings.description: Scales the brand text size locally without changing the global typography scale.

settings.label: Font Family
settings.description: Overrides the default font family for the brand component.

description: The Brand component provides a reusable pattern for brand in the interface.
